headline: Henry Schein Announces the Election of William K. "Dan" Daniel as Independent Chairman of the Board
summary: MELVILLE, N.Y., May 22, 2026--Henry Schein, Inc. (Nasdaq: HSIC), the world’s largest provider of health care solutions to office-based dental and medical practitioners, today announced that its Board of Directors has elected William K. "Dan" Daniel as Independent Chairman of the Board, effective May 21, 2026. Mr. Daniel succeeds Stanley M. Bergman, who retired from the Board following 44 years as a Director of Henry Schein and was named Chairman Emeritus in recognition of his extraordinary contr

headline: Danaher Targets Carbon Capture And AI CMC To Shape Long Term Growth
summary: Pall Corporation, a Danaher subsidiary, received government funding to pilot advanced filtration technology for carbon capture at engineering scale. Genedata, also part of Danaher, launched Genedata Vico, an AI native CMC solution co developed with major pharma partners and recognized with industry awards. For investors watching NYSE:DHR at a share price of $173.33, these updates highlight activity in both climate focused filtration and biopharma software. The stock is up 5.3% over the past...

headline: Danaher (DHR) Is Up 5.3% After Q1 Beat, EPS Hike And Biotech Momentum - What's Changed
summary: In recent weeks, Danaher reported strong Q1 2026 results with an earnings beat, raised full‑year adjusted EPS guidance, and highlighted 7% core revenue growth in its Biotechnology segment, while also advancing its pending US$9.90 billion Masimo acquisition and showcasing innovation such as the AI‑native Genedata Vico platform and carbon‑capture filtration pilots at Pall. Together, these developments underscore how Danaher is reinforcing its position across diagnostics, bioprocessing, and...
